# Core DAO Documentation
# llms.txt — AI-readable index for large language models
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org/

> Core is a Bitcoin-secured, EVM-compatible Layer-1 blockchain using Satoshi Plus consensus.
> Documentation covers protocol concepts, staking, developer guides, node operations, and APIs.

- [Core DAO Docs Home](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/intro)

## Concepts & Protocol

- [Core 101](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/introduction/core-101)
- [Quickstart](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/introduction/quickstart)
- [Why Core](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/introduction/why-core)
- [Self-Custodial Bitcoin Staking](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-concepts/self-custodial-bitcoin-staking)
- [Delegated Proof of Stake](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-concepts/delegated-proof-of-stake)
- [Delegated Proof of Work](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-concepts/delegated-proof-of-work)
- [Architecture](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-concepts/architecture)
- [Overview](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-concepts/satoshi-plus-overview)
- [Rewards](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-concepts/rewards)

- [Validator Election](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-concepts/satoshi-plus-validator-election)
- [CORE Value Creation](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-token/core-value-creation)
- [Overview](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-token/core-token-overview)
- [Tokenomics](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/core-token/tokenomics)
- [Design](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/liquid-staking/stCore/design)
- [Overview](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/liquid-staking/stCore/stcore-overview)
- [How to Liquid Stake (stCORE)](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/liquid-staking/stCore/how-to-liquid-stake-stcore)
- [Rev+ Compatibility Guide](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/rev-plus/rev-plus-compatibility-guide)
- [Protocol Design](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/rev-plus/protocol-design)
- [Overview](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/rev-plus/rev-plus-overview)

- [Governance](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/concepts/governance)

## Staking & Delegation

- [Redeem Bitcoin / Claim CORE](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/btc-staking/redeem-bitcoin-claim-core)
- [BTC Staking Transaction Decoder](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/btc-staking/btc-staking-transaction-decoder)
- [How It Works](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/btc-staking/btc-staking-how-it-works)

- [Staking BTC with Core](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/btc-staking/ledger-guides/mainnet/staking-btc-with-core)

- [Staking BTC with Core](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/btc-staking/ledger-guides/testnet/ledger-btc-staking-testnet)
- [Overview](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/btc-staking/btc-staking-overview)
- [Staking Bitcoin with Core](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/btc-staking/staking-bitcoin-with-core)
- [Using EVM Wallets](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/core-staking/using-evm-wallets)
- [Using Ledger Hardware Wallet](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/core-staking/using-ledger-hardware-wallet)
- [Bitcoin Hash Power Delegation](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/bitcoin-hash-power-delegation)
- [Delegators](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/delegators)

- [Dual Staking Integration Guide](https://docs.coredao.org/docs/staking/dual-staking/dual-staking-integration-guide)
